message:
test(runtime): Add comprehensive inline mode tests

Add 5 new tests for terminal_writer inline mode:
- resize_reanchors_ui_region: Verify UI region moves on resize
- resize_with_top_anchor_stays_at_zero: Top anchor stays at row 0
- inline_mode_never_clears_full_screen: Verify ED2 not used
- present_after_log_maintains_cursor_position: Cursor contract
- ui_height_bounds_check: Edge case when UI > terminal height

All 19 terminal_writer tests now pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
